ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the group the employee belongs to */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "hiring_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee was hired */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the employee belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "manager_id" TEXT /* ID of the employee's manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* ID of the employee being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation (e.g., personality, skills, job performance) */,
  "evaluator_id" TEXT /* ID of the person who conducted the evaluation */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback provided during the evaluation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the evaluation (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_evaluation_type FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_type") REFERENCES evaluation_types ("evaluation_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation the score belongs to */,
  "characteristic" TEXT /* Characteristic being evaluated (e.g., type 2, type 5) */,
  "score" REAL /* Score obtained in the evaluation */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the characteristic in the overall evaluation */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback for the specific score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_scores_characteristic FOREIGN KEY ("characteristic") REFERENCES characteristics ("characteristic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_scores_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characteristics" (
  "characteristic_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each characteristic */,
  "characteristic_name" TEXT /* Name of the characteristic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the characteristic */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the characteristic (e.g., personality, skills) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("characteristic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_types" (
  "evaluation_type_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each evaluation type */,
  "evaluation_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the evaluation type */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the evaluation (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., HR personnel, manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* ID of the employee being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* ID of the employee being predicted */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_score" REAL /* Predicted score of the employee */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the predictive model used */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
